name: Zhejiang Shapuaisi Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Shapuaisi Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of pharmaceutical products. The company provides its products to ophthalmology, antipyretic and analgesic, antibacterial anti-inflammatory, endocrine, liver disease adjuvant, cardiovascular, detoxification, diuretic row stone, gynecology, infusion, and jianweixiaosh categories. It offers its products in injections, oral solutions, eye drops, tablets, capsules, suppositories, granules, medicine raw materials, rinsing agents, mixtures, and other dosage forms. Zhejiang Shapuaisi Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is based in Pinghu, China.
